title: Gold 30th Birthday Number 30 Candles for Cake, 8pcs (2x Number 30 + 6x Long Stick) - Odourless, Non-Toxic, Biodegradable Wax, Suitable for All Occasions
features: 【PRODUCT INFORMATION】Package contains 2pcs number candle and 6pcs long stick candles. You can combine the number candle with other numbers to create your desired combination of numbers. The length of the number candle is about 12cm/4.7inch (candle body is about 5cm/1.97inch), the long stick candle is about 12cm/4.7inch.

【SAFE MATERIAL】Our birthday candles are made of environmentally friendly wax materials. Easy to burn, odourless, non-toxic, safe to use and easy to insert into the cake. Suitable for birthday cakes of any size or for any celebration like birthday party, anniversary, theme party and etc.

【USAGE SCENARIO】Our number birthday candles are exquisitely designed (3D three-dimensional design), It is not only for children's birthdays but for adult birthdays, and wedding anniversary, company anniversary, and other anniversaries.
【NOTE】Do not leave the lighted candles unattended. Please place candles out of reach of children. And please do not light candles on or near flammable materials.
【BUY WITH CONFIDENCE】If you have any issue about birthday candles please contact us at any time, we will answer you within 24 hours and find a best solution for you.
